displayTitle: Knights of the Old Republic #14: Days of Fear, Part 2
synopsis: Aboard the *Last Resort*, an HK-24 assassin droid reveals its orders to capture the senile old spacer Camper unharmed and kill his guardian Jarael. It nearly overpowers Jarael and Elbee before the Mandalorian Rohlan, who has been hiding on the ship in secret since Flashpoint, destroys it. Meanwhile, on the warfront planet Serroco, fugitive Padawan Zayne Carrick and the conniving Gryph run a troop-camp restaurant, and a conversation with Lieutenant Carth Onasi warns Zayne that the Mandalorians will strike the next day. When a Force vision shows him that attack annihilating the entire planet, Zayne urges Gryph to flee at once, then reveals he will not leave with him: instead he intends to warn the Republic commander, Admiral Karath.
title: Knights of the Old Republic #14: Days of Fear, Part 2
